scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:admin-ui && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.cpSync('src/ui-assets', 'dist/src/ui-assets', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('src/ui-extensions', 'dist/src/ui-extensions', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('src/plugins/images', 'dist/src/plugins/images', {recursive:true});"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const base=process.env.INIT_CWD||process.cwd();const script=path.join(base,'patch-vendure-ui.js');if(fs.existsSync(script)){const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,[script],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(result.status ?? 0);}console.log('patch-vendure-ui.js not found, skipping.');"
